subject.title: v7 Pre-Release Checklist
subject.body:
# AI SDK v7 Pre-Release

Tracking issue for the v7 pre-release cycle. See [contributing/pre-release-cycle.md](https://github.com/vercel/ai/blob/main/contributing/pre-release-cycle.md) for the full process documentation.

## Pre-release setup

- [x] Add pre-release cycle documentation (#12998)
- [x] Create `release-v6.0` maintenance branch from current `main` HEAD
- [x] Enter beta mode: `pnpm changeset pre enter beta`
- [x] Create major changeset for all published packages
- [x] Create V4 spec skeleton in `@ai-sdk/provider` (copy V3, rename types)
- [x] Create V4 mock test utilities in `packages/ai/src/test/`
- [ ] Merge pre-release PR (https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/13001) — first `ai@7.0.0-beta.1` publishes automatically

## Documentation site (ai-sdk.dev)

- [x] Update `.github/workflows/update-sdk-submodule-v6.yml` — track `release-v6.0` instead of `main`
- [x] Create `.github/workflows/update-sdk-submodule-v7.yml` — fetch `main`, check out `sdk/v7`, push to `origin sdk/v7`
- [ ] Create `sdk/v7` branch in `ai-studio` (default branch stays `sdk/v6`)
- [ ] Vercel: create v7 preview deployment on `sdk/v7` branch (`v7.ai-sdk.dev`)

## During pre-release

- [ ] All feature PRs target `main` as usual
- [ ] Use `backport` label to port fixes to `release-v6.0`
- [ ] Iterate on V4 spec changes
- [ ] Update `packages/ai` core functions to support V4 spec alongside V3
- [ ] Update providers to implement V4 spec
- [ ] Migration guide (`content/docs/08-migration-guides`)
- [ ] Codemods (`packages/codemod`)

## Stable release

- [ ] Exit beta mode: `pnpm changeset pre exit`
- [ ] Merge Version Packages PR to publish `ai@7.0.0`
- [ ] Archive `release-v6.0` branch
